title: Electromagnetic pulse launcher

The '''electromagnetic pulse (EMP) launcher''' was a devastating weapon when used against the [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droid]] forces of the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] as they were able to both deactivate droids by shorting out electronics and destroy their interior circuitry with powerful EMP waves. [[Clone jet trooper/Legends|Clone jet troopers]] used these as their primary weapon.

==Description==
The [[Merr-Sonn Munitions, Inc./Legends|Merr-Sonn]] electromagnetic pulse launcher was an [[Ion cannon/Legends|ion weapon]] capable of disrupting [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]]. Upon impact with a solid object, the projectile would detonate, dealing ion damage to the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] circuitry.<ref name="BF1 guide" /><ref name="BF2 guide" /> The electricity would short-circuit the droids' neural network and render the droid useless.<ref name="Hard Contact">''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]''</ref> Droids hit by a blast from an EMP launcher had a tendency to fly apart as the electromagnetic couplings for their limbs were overloaded by the pulse. The [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic's]] [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] [[Clone jet trooper/Legends|clone jet troopers]] used the EMP launcher on battlefronts throughout the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="BF1" /><ref name="BF2" />

==Behind the scenes==
The EMP launcher appears in the [[Star Wars Battlefront (series)|''Star Wars: Battlefront'']] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] series, serving as the primary weapon of the jet trooper, the Republic's unit of the special class. In the [[Star Wars: Battlefront|first game]], the weapon unleashes powerful blasts of electromagnetic pulse upon impact that can consistently destroy fully-shielded [[Droideka/Legends|droidekas]] in two hits.<ref name="BF1" /> Although it retains its name and identity as the jet trooper's primary weapon in the [[Star Wars: Battlefront II|sequel]], the ion effect was removed, causing it to function as a normal rocket launcher.<ref name="BF2" /> It also appears in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Hard Contact]]''.<ref name="Hard Contact" />

In the ''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]'', the EMP launcher is listed under the weapons of the clone jet trooper as the "EMP [[Grenade launcher/Legends|grenade launcher]]".<ref name="CW Campaign">''[[The Clone Wars Campaign Guide]]''</ref> This is inconsistent with the original ''Star Wars: Battlefront'' video game, where the weapon operates like a [[Missile launcher/Legends|rocket launcher]] instead,<ref name="BF1" /> and the game's [[Star Wars Battlefront: Prima Official Game Guide|strategy guide]] describes the discharge as not a physical projectile, but a pure blast of electromagnetic energy.<ref name="BF1 guide" /><ref name="BF2 guide" />
